headline: CAT Holds Dividend Steady For Now: Is a Hike Around the Corner?
summary: Caterpillar keeps dividend unchanged. A record backlog and renewed earnings growth reinforce confidence in its cash flow strength and an imminent hike.

headline: ITW SCHEDULES FIRST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS WEBCAST
summary: GLENVIEW - Illinois Tool Works Inc. will issue its first quarter 2026 results on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. CDT. Following the release, ITW will hold its first quarter 2026 earnings...
